changeDescription: Added a connectInFlight guard plus an active-socket guard to connectWebSocket(). connectInFlight is set synchronously before the validateConnectionConfig await and reset when the socket opens/closes/errors (and on disconnect/blockReconnect), so concurrent re-entries during the await window no longer create competing sockets. Each socket's open/message/close/error listener now checks 'if (socket !== activeSocket) return', neutralizing any orphaned socket so only the current socket drives connection state and reconnect scheduling.
